Video.summary: The episode kicks off with the women's singles match, where the Miami team battles it out against the Fort Myers Flamingos. The focus shifts to men's singles in the second half of the game, highlighting the veteran Miami team and their notable chemistry on the court. Tune in to see key plays, player highlights, and team strategy.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Video.summary: December 5, 2023 - Welcome to the first round of the semi-finals for season 2 of The Arizona Pickleball League! It's Tuesday Night Pickleball @ The Orchard, and the Peoria Pythons face-off against the Tempe Tornadoes.

Image.alt: December 5, 2023 - AZ PBL

December 5, 2023 - AZ PBL

Video.summary: It's a "Terrific Tuesday" at the World Pickleball League (WPL) as Day 5 features a critical matchup between the Bengaluru Jawans and the Delhi Dilwale. The stakes are high: Delhi, currently number five on the points table, has a chance to move to number three if the results go their way, while Bengaluru looks to bounce back from a recent loss.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Delhi - Day 5 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Delhi - Day 5 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Delhi - Day 5 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Delhi - Day 5 Tie 1

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League (WPBL) continues on Day 5 at the CCI Brabourne Stadium with a clash between Mumbai Pickle Power and the Chennai Super Champs.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Chennai - Day 5 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Chennai - Day 5 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Chennai - Day 5 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Chennai - Day 5 Tie 2

Video.summary: The high-voltage group stage of the World Pickleball League (WPL) nears its end on Day 8 with a crucial tie between the Hyderabad Superstars and the Chennai Super Champs. The commentary team sets the stage for a tense match, which is determined by an incredibly close final scoreline and points difference, with all six teams still in the running for the four semi-final spots. Also witness the Exhibition Match of the Century featuring Bollywood superstars Aamir Ali (Team Aamir) and Ali Fazal (Team Ali), live from the CCI Brabourne Stadium.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1 + Bollywood Exhibition Match

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1 + Bollywood Exhibition Match
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1 + Bollywood Exhibition Match
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1 + Bollywood Exhibition Match

Video.title: NCPA Round of 64: UCI vs. UCF

NCPA Round of 64: UCI vs. UCF
NCPA Round of 64: UCI vs. UCF

Video.summary: A high-level pickleball match from the 2025 NCPA Utah Regional as the Utah Tech collegiate program's top two teams battle head-to-head. Filmed live at Club Pickleball USA in Orem, Utah, this episode features the Women's Doubles showdown between the #2 seed Utah Tech 1, featuring Lauren Mercado and Ella Boydston, against the #3 seed Utah Tech 2, anchored by NCPA commentator Dillon Champigny and rising star Mary Monson. Experience the intense collegiate format, which includes singles, doubles, and mixed doubles, a design optimized based on direct player feedback.
Video.title: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Tech1 vs. Utah Tech2

Image.alt: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Tech1 vs. Utah Tech2
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Tech1 vs. Utah Tech2
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Tech1 vs. Utah Tech2

Video.summary: NCPA Semifinals: Virginia Tech takes on Utah Tech in the 2025 NCPA Championships from Las Vegas.
Video.title: NCPA Semifinals: Virginia Tech vs. Utah Tech

Image.alt: NCPA Semifinals: Virginia Tech vs. Utah Tech
NCPA Semifinals: Virginia Tech vs. Utah Tech
NCPA Semifinals: Virginia Tech vs. Utah Tech

Video.summary: The Men’s Doubles Open Quarterfinal at the 2023 English Nationals delivers a riveting showdown as rising talents Daniel Wren and Alex Woolf take on the experienced pairing of Wesley Jackson and Bernie Audibert. Every point is a test of patience, power, and precision, with both teams refusing to back down in this critical battle for a spot in the semifinals.With crowd energy building and momentum swinging back and forth, this match captures the grit and skill that define top-tier British pickleball. Who will punch their ticket to the next round?
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Quarterfinal – Wren & Woolf vs Jackson & Audibert

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Quarterfinal – Wren & Woolf vs Jackson & Audibert
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Quarterfinal – Wren & Woolf vs Jackson & Audibert
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Quarterfinal – Wren & Woolf vs Jackson & Audibert
